title: Metain: AI-Powered Roblox Game Builder
text:
Build your Roblox game with Metain
Create games by simply typing prompts
Attach
"Metain helps developers build Roblox games faster than ever"
— The Metain Team
AI-Powered
Code generation
Real-time
Studio sync
Luau
Native support
Our Mission
Ship games faster with AI
Metain transforms how you create Roblox experiences. From UI design to complex scripting our AI handles the heavy lifting
AI Code Generation
Describe what you want in plain English. Metain generates production-ready Luau scripts instantly.
UI Builder
Create game UIs by prompting. See results instantly in Studio.
Live Studio Sync
Changes sync to Roblox Studio in real-time via WebSocket. See your updates instantly.
